items.name: model-picker
items.title: Model Picker
items.description: Compact shadcn-style model picker with app-owned models, optional suggestions, reasoning, plan mode, and fast mode.
items.author: d3serve Labs
items.docs: Installed files are source-owned by your app. Pass the models you want in the picker, use createModelPickerModel/defineModelPickerModels for typed model lists, use resolveModelPickerSelection for Vercel AI SDK route handlers, and opt into showSuggestedModels when your model list needs a suggested group. The UI composes shadcn dropdown-menu and tooltip registry dependencies so Base UI and Radix projects keep their chosen primitive stack. This install is the non-animated baseline; use model-picker-animated if you want Motion layout and width animations.

meta.aiSdk: Vercel AI SDK model IDs are exposed through integrations.aiSdk and resolveModelPickerSelection.
meta.motion: This baseline item does not install motion. Install model-picker-animated for Motion-powered layout and width animations.

items.name: model-picker-animated
items.title: Model Picker Animated
items.description: Motion-powered drop-in Model Picker variant with animated model width, capability slots, and control layout changes.
items.author: d3serve Labs
items.docs: Install this instead of model-picker when you want the animated implementation. It uses the same ModelPicker API and installs to the same @ui/model-picker.tsx target, but adds Motion-powered layout and width animation. It composes shadcn dropdown-menu and tooltip registry dependencies so Base UI and Radix projects keep their chosen primitive stack.

meta.motion: This item installs motion and uses motion/react for control layout, slot, and label width animation.
meta.target: Drop-in replacement for model-picker. Install one of model-picker or model-picker-animated.

items.name: model-picker-sources
items.title: Model Picker Model Sources
items.description: Optional dynamic model source helpers for Vercel AI Gateway and OpenRouter catalogs.
items.author: d3serve Labs
items.docs: Install this only if you want dynamic catalog helpers. Use fetchVercelAIGatewayModels or fetchOpenRouterModels with modelIds, providers, filter, and limit options so your picker only receives models you intentionally expose.

items.name: model-picker-tanstack-openrouter
items.title: Model Picker TanStack OpenRouter
items.description: Optional type-safe TanStack AI OpenRouter adapter helpers for Model Picker models.
items.author: d3serve Labs
items.docs: Install this only if your app uses TanStack AI with OpenRouter. createModelPickerOpenRouterModel keeps OpenRouter model IDs typed against the installed adapter, and createModelPickerOpenRouterTextAdapter avoids casts at the call site.
